name: Ovation Credit Services by LendingTree
description_short: Ovation Credit Services was a LendingTree subsidiary offering credit repair services from Jacksonville, FL. The company ceased operations in April 2023. BBB profile shows business is closed. Former BBB A+ rating.
description_long:
Ovation Credit Services was a credit repair company founded in 2004 and headquartered in Jacksonville, Florida. The company was acquired by LendingTree in 2018 and operated as a wholly owned subsidiary, providing credit repair and credit management services to consumers nationwide. At its peak, Ovation was one of the larger credit repair providers in the United States, leveraging LendingTree's brand recognition and marketing reach to attract clients seeking credit score improvement.

Ovation's services included credit report analysis across all three major bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion), dispute letter preparation and filing for inaccurate or unverifiable items, debt validation requests, goodwill adjustment letters, and credit education resources. The company offered two primary service tiers: the Essentials Plan and the Essentials Plus Plan, with pricing that was generally competitive with other national credit repair providers. Ovation emphasized a technology-driven approach with an online portal for tracking dispute progress and credit score changes.

The company ceased operations in April 2023, and its BBB profile now reflects a closed business status. Before closure, Ovation maintained a BBB A+ rating with approximately 76 complaints closed in the last three years and 28 in the final 12 months of operation. The closure was part of LendingTree's broader cost-cutting measures during a period of rising interest rates and reduced mortgage refinancing activity. Consumers who had active accounts with Ovation were affected by the abrupt shutdown, with some reporting difficulty obtaining refunds or final dispute status updates.

Since Ovation is no longer operational, consumers seeking credit repair services should explore active alternatives. Professional credit repair companies like The Credit People, Credit Saint, and Sky Blue Credit offer similar three-bureau dispute services with monthly subscription models. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about report changes without the credit repair component. For consumers who prefer a DIY approach, direct disputes can be filed for free through AnnualCreditReport.com and each bureau's online portal. Nonprofit credit counseling agencies offer free budgeting guidance and can help consumers develop plans to address the root causes of credit damage. A credit score simulator can help consumers estimate the potential impact of removing specific negative items before investing in paid services. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

certifications: 76 BBB complaints in final 3 years of operation

pros: Was backed by LendingTree, a publicly traded company with significant financial resources
Offered technology-driven dispute tracking through online portal
Maintained BBB A+ rating during years of active operation
Provided goodwill adjustment letters as part of service offerings
Two-tier pricing gave consumers flexibility in service level selection
cons: Company ceased operations in April 2023 and is no longer accepting new clients
Some consumers reported difficulty obtaining refunds after closure
BBB profile now shows business as closed with unresolved complaints
LendingTree ownership raised questions about data sharing with affiliated lending products
Yelp reviews (15 total, 2.0 stars) suggest mixed experiences even before closure
best_for: This company is no longer operational. Consumers should explore active alternatives such as The Credit People, Credit Saint, or Sky Blue Credit for similar credit repair services.
diagnosis: Ovation Credit Services ceased operations in April 2023 after LendingTree's cost-cutting measures. The company previously offered competitive credit repair services with BBB A+ rating and LendingTree brand backing. This profile is maintained for historical reference only. Consumers searching for Ovation should be directed to active alternatives. Any website still appearing under the Ovation brand should be treated with caution as the legitimate business is confirmed closed.
services: Credit report analysis across three bureaus (historical)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
